app.title: Sayane
profile.label: Profile
capture.clipboard_error: Could not read the clipboard. Check browser permissions or capture a selection instead.
capture.page_hint: Page capture may include UI and navigation text. Prefer selection capture for important context.
capture.warning.page_low_confidence: Note: Page capture may include UI navigation noise.
insert.preview_note: DOM adapter only (local-custom). Bridge compile not supported.
candidate.label: Candidate
page.detail.open_supported: Open a supported site tab (e.g. ChatGPT).
page.detail.cs_reload: If you reloaded the extension, reload the target page too.
page.reason.content_script_unavailable: Content script is not responding. If you reloaded the extension, reload the target page too. If it still fails, check the content script bundle and manifest configuration.
page.reason.extractor_failed: Failed to extract page body on {provider}. Reload the page.
page.reason.not_readable: Page body is not readable enough.
page.reason.host_permission: This URL is outside extension host permissions.
page.reason.extension_page_active: An extension page (Options) is active. Focus a ChatGPT (or supported) tab.
diff.title: Diff Viewer
diff.error.fetch_failed: Could not fetch diff. Check Local Bridge status, Bridge URL, and token.
options.title: Sayane Options
options.hint: Run sayane serve locally. Copy the bearer token from ~/.sayane/bridge.token (pairing code shown on first start).
options.developer_mode_hint: When enabled, low-confidence page capture appears in the popup for debugging.
error.bridge_token: Bridge token not configured. Set it in Options.
error.restricted_page: Cannot capture on this page. Open a normal https:// page, reload the tab if you updated the extension, then try again.
detail.evaluation_note: RDE and UIB are review aids, not automatic decisions.
detail.critical_override_warning: This candidate is classified as critical. Override only if you can explain why.
detail.critical_override_confirm: I understand this critical warning and want to override it.
detail.critical_override_confirm_dialog: This will override a critical RDE warning. Continue?
detail.unknown_section_warning: This candidate targets an unknown or unexpected section: {section}
uib.UD.description: Uncertainty detection. Interpret as a review aid, not a decision.
uib.MI.description: Material integrity. Interpret as a review aid, not a decision.
uib.CH.description: Coherence. Interpret as a review aid, not a decision.
uib.DT.description: Diegetic truthfulness. Interpret as a review aid, not a decision.
uib.VP.description: Value preservation. Interpret as a review aid, not a decision.
uib.FG.description: Factual grounding. Interpret as a review aid, not a decision.
sidepanel.title: Sayane — Candidate review
sidepanel.context_banner: Comparison against your saved Sayane context. This is not LLM memory.
popup.review_hint: Open the side panel to review candidates against your saved Sayane context.
review.persona_dump_warning: Structured persona document detected. Do not bulk-approve; split into short units such as interests, concepts, or dev environment before saving.
review.action.conflict: Recommended: check diff against saved context
review.action.meaning_changed: Recommended: confirm meaning change is intended
review.action.low_value: Recommended: low priority; review only if needed
review.risk.reject_recommended: May distort saved context if approved as-is.
review.risk.sensitive_review: May include sensitive, third-party, or bulk persona content.
review.risk.conflict: Differs from or overlaps existing saved context.
review.risk.meaning_changed: Would change meaning of saved context.
review.risk.inferred_extension: Content was inferred from capture, not stated verbatim.
review.risk.new_candidate: Not yet evaluated against saved context.
review.risk.duplicate_or_confirmed: Likely already present in saved context.
review.approve_blocked_hint: Expand details to review before approving this candidate.
